connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.layman_summary: Pull repos, issues, and YAML access requests from your GitHub account.
connectors.helps_with: Import real repo context and trial request files for access-review evidence.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — GitHub OAuth popup (your account, cached for this chat session only).

actions.label: Repositories
actions.layman: Search and attach a repo — the chat reads README, tree, and key files.

actions.label: Issues & PRs
actions.layman: Pull recent issues/PR metadata as evidence for triage bots.

connectors.name: Google Drive
connectors.layman_summary: Pull spreadsheets, docs, and images from Drive as review evidence.
connectors.helps_with: Attach policy PDFs, architecture diagrams, or trial notes without emailing files.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — Google OAuth popup for Drive (session-only; not stored in .env).

actions.label: Files & spreadsheets
actions.layman: Search Drive and attach docs, sheets, or PDFs — indexed for chat like GitHub repos.

actions.label: Photos & images
actions.layman: Import screenshots, architecture diagrams, and redacted UI captures.

actions.label: Videos
actions.layman: Reference screen recordings or walkthroughs (metadata + transcript if available).

connectors.name: Nebius
connectors.layman_summary: Powers the chat LLM (cost Q&A and access-review narration).
connectors.helps_with: Runs Llama and other models on Nebius Studio for this demo agent.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — paste your Nebius API key in the popup (this session only).

connectors.name: Tavily
connectors.layman_summary: Live web search for AI provider pricing, benchmarks, and news.
connectors.helps_with: Grounds cost comparisons in current public pricing instead of stale guesses.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — paste your Tavily API key in the popup (this session only).

connectors.name: Composio
connectors.layman_summary: Your Composio project for integrations (GitHub, Slack, Jira, Sheets).
connectors.helps_with: Uses your Composio key in-session to plan tool actions.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — paste your Composio API key in the popup (session only).

connectors.name: OpenClaw
connectors.layman_summary: Optional agent runtime for multi-step tool loops (advanced).
connectors.helps_with: When installed, runs the same tool-calling loop as the built-in agent runtime.
connectors.how_to_connect: Click Sign in — confirm OpenClaw for this session in the popup.

intro.skills_blurb: Skills are pre-built **access-review proof packs**. Attach one or more, ask a plain-English question, then Send — the AI answers from real DecisionPacket data (who is blocked, what proof is missing). They do not grant production access.
intro.connectors_blurb: Connectors sign in to GitHub, Google Drive, and API services. After sign-in, use Import to attach files to your message. Server keys (Nebius, Tavily) come from .env.
